notes:
**Joint release Desktop + Managed Server 0.26.0:** Ambient app-focus capture (opt-in), right-click menus everywhere, and quality-of-life polish.

## Ambient App Focus (opt-in, off by default)
Keen can now — only if you turn it on — notice which apps hold your attention (app identity and focus time only; never window titles or content) so your Daily Summary and insights stop going stale on days you work outside Keen. Enable it in Settings → General, and pause any time from the tray. Nothing is captured until you opt in.

## Right-click menus and layout control
Context menus arrive across the app: chat sessions, favorites, tasks, calendar events, summary sections, and progress notes. Side rails and preview panes are now resizable by dragging, and remember your widths.

## Faster task workflows
Clicking a task's status circle now completes it (like Reminders); ⌥-click opens a full status menu. Task creation is first-class on the Project Dashboard, and Quick Task saves with just a title. Long titles reveal themselves on hover with new tooltip styling.

## Fixes
First edits in the description editor no longer vanish, editor content is saved when you press Escape or close, and overdue review-status tasks show their overdue indicator again.

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.26.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.26.0_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates. Managed servers update in place via Settings → "Update your server" if prompted.
